checks: frontend/index.html, frontend/tsconfig.json e frontend/tsconfig.node.json existem e completam o bootstrap minimo do frontend Vite/TypeScript.

python -m compileall backend/app backend/tests executado com sucesso apos as correcoes.

checks: backend/app/models/agent_result.py e backend/app/models/task_context.py definem os contratos unificados AgentResult e TaskContext usados pelos adapters.
